stemHtml: The Fourth Freedom of the Air defined in the International Air Transport Agreement is the...

options.a: right to carry passengers from an other State to the State in which the aircraft is registered.
options.b: right to land for a technical stop in another State.
options.c: right to carry passengers from the State in which the aircraft is registered an other State.
options.d: right to carry passengers from one State to another, while en-route to or from the State in which the aircraft is registered.
